title: ProEssentials
description: ProEssentials is a comprehensive essentials plugin for Minecraft 1.21.x that bundles key server features
body: ProEssentials is a comprehensive essentials plugin for Minecraft 1.21.x that bundles key server features into one package: Economy with shop/bank/coin flip, teleport (homes/warps/TPA), moderation & staff tools, chat system (format, local/global, mentions), UI (scoreboard/tab list/action bar/boss bar), and AntiLag cleanup. In addition, there are integrations such as LuckPerms ranks/prefixes and optional vault support.
